cards.prompt: An equation that relates a function to its derivatives

cards.prompt: A differential equation that can be written so that all terms involving $y$ are on one side and all terms involving $x$ are on the other

cards.prompt: A given point $(x_0, y_0)$ used to determine the constant in a general solution

cards.prompt: Exponential growth/decay differential equation

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Solution to $\frac{dy}{dt} = ky$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: When $k > 0$ in $\frac{dy}{dt} = ky$, the quantity increases without bound over time

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: When $k < 0$ in $\frac{dy}{dt} = ky$, the quantity decreases toward zero over time

cards.prompt: General solution to the logistic differential equation

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: The maximum population value $L$ that a logistic model approaches as $t \to \infty$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Population value at which logistic growth is fastest (inflection point of $P(t)$)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Euler's method: formula for the next approximation $y_{n+1}$ (BC only)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A numerical method that uses the slope at the current point to approximate the next point on a solution curve, using steps of size $\Delta x$ (BC only)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Separation of variables procedure: rewrite $\frac{dy}{dx} = f(x)g(y)$ so each variable is on one side

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: A solution curve on a slope field where the slope segments are all zero — the function stays constant

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Maximum rate of change in a logistic model (value of $\frac{dP}{dt}$ when $P = \frac{L}{2}$)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: In a logistic model, solutions approach $L$ from below if $0 < P_0 < L$, and decrease toward $L$ if $P_0 > L$ — this behavior is called

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Half-life formula: time for exponential decay to reach half its initial value ($y = Ce^{kt}$, $k < 0$)

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Euler's method produces better approximations when this value is decreased

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
cards.prompt: Constant $A$ in the logistic solution $P(t) = \frac{L}{1+Ae^{-kt}}$ in terms of initial condition $P(0) = P_0$

cards.subject: ap-calculus-bc
